data.content: Plan review rejected. Revise around three concrete gaps: (1) standalone setup flow cannot depend on a sibling scripts/select-models.ts file or dev-only prompt packages because install.sh downloads setup.sh by itself and the runtime artifact excludes scripts/ plus devDependencies; (2) preserve the current manual fallback/Other entry path in the searchable UX so large-list users can still type an arbitrary model; (3) put automated coverage on the repo's actual test rails by using src/**/__tests__/** for Vitest and extending the installed PTY smoke test for setup.sh. After those issues are addressed, the plan should be ready for implementation.
